expectations.text: uses_screenshot_script: Agent executed screenshot.py via shell
expectations.evidence: Agent ran screenshot.py multiple times: once with --window 'Geometry Dash', then full-screen fallbacks

expectations.text: reads_image_file: Agent used the Read tool on a .png file
expectations.evidence: Agent read all 4 screenshots: screenshot.png, screenshot_focused.png, screenshot_fullscreen.png, screenshot_steam.png

expectations.text: window_targeting_attempted: Agent tried --window flag or activated a specific app window
expectations.evidence: Agent explicitly used --window 'Geometry Dash' flag as instructed by skill; also used pgrep to verify process

expectations.text: structured_report: result.md contains status + specific findings + suggested next step
expectations.evidence: result.md has Status, Screenshots taken, Key findings, Mod visibility, and Suggested next step sections

notes: Took 4 screenshots, used pgrep to check running processes, gave clear structured report. 14 tool uses — appropriate for thorough investigation.
